manga.title: Title
manga.chapterUrlHelp: Use $chapter as a placeholder for the chapter number, e.g. https://example.com/manga/$chapter
manga.chapterUrlNoPlaceholder: ⚠ No $chapter found – automatic chapter detection won't work
manga.duplicateWarningText: A manga named "{title}" already exists. Save anyway?
manga.duplicatesHint: Possible duplicates were detected after sync. Please review the entries below and delete any unwanted duplicates.
manga.focusHint: Add up to 3 manga to Focus
manga.recoveryHint: You closed the app without saving the chapter you read.

reader.chooseWhat: What do you want to open?
reader.templateMismatchHint: The current URL no longer matches the stored template. Automatic detection could not find a confident match (confidence below 60%). Please review the suggested URL and adjust it if needed.

domainGuard.title: Different Domain
domainGuard.message: You are navigating to a different domain: {domain}

settings.title: Settings
settings.mobileNotificationsHint: Checks in the background and sends push notifications for new chapters
settings.notifPermissionDenied: Permission denied – please enable notifications for this app in system settings
settings.backgroundNotificationsHint: Scans for new chapters even when the app is closed and sends push notifications
settings.readerSeparateWindowHint: Reader opens its own window instead of an embedded area
settings.elementPickerEnabledHint: Press F2 in the reader to click an element and hide it permanently
settings.blockNewWindowsHint: Prevents popup windows from opening (e.g. ad popups)
settings.titleExpandHint: Hovering (desktop) or tapping (mobile) shows the full title
settings.autoLinkHint: On save, automatically searches MangaDex and ComicK.io for the best match and links it
settings.syncEnabledHint: Syncs your manga list across devices using a private GitHub Gist
settings.syncTokenHint: Create a token at github.com/settings/tokens with the 'gist' scope

log.title: Activity Log
log.empty: No entries yet – trigger a scan or wait for the next automatic scan

mods.title: Mods
mods.emptyHint: Drop mods into the mods folder.
mods.tabMissingHint: The mod was removed, disabled, or failed to load.
mods.restartHint: Restart required for changes to take effect.
